title: Jungle Maze Adventure
description:
In a clearing, you run into a [green]Ragtag Group of Adventurers[/green] looking down and gesturing at a [purple]gigantic maze[/purple].

They offer to join forces with you in an [b]Epic Quest[/b] to loot the riches of this maze. As an experienced adventurer yourself, it's clear this maze is filled with [red][jitter]deadly traps[/jitter][/red] and [orange][sine]guardians[/sine][/orange].

It would be easier if you work together, but then you would have to split the loot.
notes:
Both gold rewards have dynamic variance applied during the event (±15 gold), so Join Forces yields 35–65 Gold while Solo Quest yields 135–165 Gold. The 18 HP damage taken in Solo Quest is unblockable and unpowered, making it a true HP cost rather than blockable damage.

**If you Join Forces:** Everyone's face immediately lights up. One of the adventurers turns out to be a bard! You merrily waltz into the maze as [aqua]Aquid the squid wizard[/aqua] effortlessly disarms traps, while you and the [red]Grathorian fighter[/red] take out the [orange]spiky club-wielding guards[/orange] with ease. This was the most joyous adventure of your life and you've made some truly [gold][sine]Great Memories[/sine][/gold].

**If you go Solo:** Feeling misanthropic, you wordlessly walk past their now-frowning faces. One of them even [jitter][purple]shakes their fist[/purple][/jitter] at you. The maze is not welcoming. You fall into a spike trap, you are struck by a massive log with spikes, and [orange]feisty creatures with spiky clubs[/orange] fight you along the entire journey. You are sick of spikes, and consider teamwork for the next adventure.

The solo path also plays animated visual effects (random blunt/slash/heavy attack VFX) with audio cues during the damage phase.
